editionData.title: Daily Brief for April 22, 2026: Global Headlines, Markets, Hacker News, Product Hunt
editionData.description: A daily brief for April 22, 2026 covering global headlines, market closes, Hacker News, and Product Hunt.
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Extends Cease-Fire With Iran
headlines.summary: The pause in hostilities had been set to expire within hours. The president said Pakistan, which is trying to mediate an end to the war, requested he hold off any attacks.

headlines.title: How the Cole Disaster Drove the U.S. to Develop New Warship Defenses
headlines.summary: The Navy destroyers enforcing a blockade of Iranian ports carry weapons fielded after an American warship was attacked and nearly sunk more than 25 years ago.

headlines.title: Trump Is Said to Be in Talks to Send Afghans Who Aided U.S. Forces to Congo
headlines.summary: A U.S. aid worker said that the Afghans, who were evacuated to Qatar, would face a choice between moving to the Democratic Republic of Congo and living under the Taliban.

headlines.title: Fired U.K. Official Describes ‘Pressure’ to Expedite Envoy’s Appointment
headlines.summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s office wanted Peter Mandelson, a Jeffrey Epstein associate, swiftly installed as ambassador to Washington, the official said.

headlines.title: U.S. Turns Up Pressure on Iraq to Distance Itself From Iran
headlines.summary: Washington is demanding that the Baghdad government dismantle Iran-backed Iraqi militias that have been attacking Americans and U.S. sites there recently.

headlines.title: Tehran vows to ‘resist bullying’ as Trump extends Iran truce, blocks ports
Paraguay plans to accept 25 third-country migrant deportees from US
Trump administration sues Southern Poverty Law Center on fraud charges
Peru’s election chief steps down amid frustration over long vote count
Myanmar’s military government rebuffed on peace talks offer
Virginia voters OK a Democratic effort to redraw the state's congressional map
headlines.summary: Virginia voters have delivered a significant win to Democrats, as the party aims to pick up four more U.S. House seats in the state.

headlines.title: Southern Poverty Law Center indicted on federal fraud charges
headlines.summary: The Justice Department alleges that the SPLC improperly raised millions of dollars to pay informants to infiltrate the Ku Klux Klan and other extremist groups.

headlines.title: Instead of civil war, a naked mole rat colony changed queens peacefully
headlines.summary: These matriarchal rodents often have bloody succession wars to replace their queen. But in a colony in California, Queen Tere ceded the throne to her daughter, Arwen, without violence.

headlines.title: As Pakistan seeks to broker U.S.–Iran peace, citizens watch for gains at home
headlines.summary: As Pakistan works to broker peace between the U.S. and Iran, many Pakistanis are watching closely to see whether the diplomatic boost will translate into improvements at home.

headlines.title: Florida AG launches criminal investigation into ChatGPT over FSU shooting
headlines.summary: Florida's attorney general is launching a criminal investigation into the alleged role of ChatGPT in a mass shooting at Florida State University last year.

headlines.title: Macron urges Israel to abandon 'territorial ambitions' in Lebanon
headlines.summary: PARIS - French President Emmanuel Macron said Tuesday that Israel must "renounce its territorial ambitions" in Lebanon, calling for a political settlement to ensure regional stability.

headlines.title: UN voices hope for US-Iran talks resumption
headlines.summary: UNITED NATIONS - The United Nations hopes for the resumption of talks between the United States and Iran and the extension of the current ceasefire, a UN spokesman said Tuesday.

headlines.title: US mayor's Shanghai visit renews cooperation
headlines.summary: The mayor of San Francisco, Daniel Lurie, pledged to deepen the 46-year sister-city relationship with Shanghai during his two-day visit beginning on Sunday, his first international trip since taking office in January.

headlines.title: Trump extends US ceasefire with Iran
headlines.summary: WASHINGTON - US President Donald Trump said Tuesday he will extend the ceasefire with Iran as the current two-week truce is set to expire on Wednesday night.

headlines.title: China's aid role growing, Oxford researcher says
headlines.summary: China plays an increasingly important role in international humanitarian efforts as the global aid system undergoes a painful "reset" marked by shrinking resources and rising needs, a senior British researcher has said.

headlines.title: BJP seeks Election Commission action against Congress chief Kharge for remark on PM
headlines.summary: BJP demands Election Commission action against Congress chief Kharge for calling PM Modi a "terrorist" during a press conference.

headlines.title: Development initiatives, capacity building will be in focus at fourth India-Africa Forum Summit
headlines.summary: The Fourth India-Africa Forum Summit will emphasize development, education, and diplomatic ties, fostering stronger India-Africa relations.

headlines.title: Supreme Court directs panel to formulate plan for disabled-friendly prisons
headlines.summary: Supreme Court directs committee to create a plan for making prisons accessible and supportive for disabled inmates.

headlines.title: Can we expect a believer to follow any age-old practice in the modern era, asks Supreme Court
headlines.summary: Supreme Court questions whether modern believers should adhere to age-old practices amidst evolving education and rationality in religion.

headlines.title: Yogi leads march against Opposition; Akhilesh predicts U.P. poll defeat
headlines.summary: Yogi Adityanath leads a protest against opposition parties over women's quota bill defeat, while Akhilesh Yadav predicts governance shift in U.P.
